name: ProPhase Labs, Inc.
summary: ProPhase Labs, Inc. is a diversified biotech, genomics, and consumer products company. It offers whole genome sequencing through Nebula Genomics and DNA Complete, develops novel drugs and dietary supplements via ProPhase BioPharma (PBIO), markets TK Supplements dietary supplements, and previously provided COVID-19 PCR and antigen diagnostic testing. The company also owns worldwide exclusive rights to the BE-Smart Esophageal Pre-Cancer diagnostic screening test.

products.name: Whole Genome Sequencing
products.description: Human genomic testing and related services offered through Nebula Genomics, Inc. and DNA Complete, Inc.

products.name: BE-Smart Esophageal Pre-Cancer Diagnostic Screening Test
products.description: Diagnostic test for early detection of esophageal cancer risk, currently under development as a Laboratory Developed Test.

products.name: TK Supplements
products.description: Dietary supplements developed and marketed under the TK Supplements brand.

products.name: COVID-19 PCR Testing
products.description: Polymerase chain reaction testing for COVID-19 and Influenza A and B, previously offered through ProPhase Diagnostics.

products.name: COVID-19 Rapid Antigen Testing
products.description: Rapid antigen testing for COVID-19, previously offered through ProPhase Diagnostics.

partnerships.description: Collaboration for continued development and optimization of the BE-Smart Esophageal Pre-Cancer diagnostic screening test using clinical proteomics.
Collaboration announced March 2023 for development of BE-Smart Esophageal Pre-Cancer diagnostic screening test.
